description: Catalog of network configs and service topology used across the FlexNetOS meta workspace.

networks.summary: Governed web-egress / headless-browser engine for AI agents — the network plane's web-egress engine, governed by lane per ADR-0001. Exposes MCP (obscura mcp) + CDP (obscura serve :9222) service endpoints plus an obscura fetch CLI.
networks.notes: Rust headless-browser engine (8-crate workspace, real V8). Primary surface here is the CDP server (ws, obscura serve --port 9222); also serves MCP over stdio or --http --port 3000 (browser_navigate / browser_fetch / ...) and a CLI (obscura fetch <url>). lane<->obscura seam (ADR-0001): live web egress is governed by lane, which pins obscura's egress through its proxy + CA via the `lane web` seam; live obscura wiring is still gated on the seam. Fork of upstream h4ckf0r0day/obscura; brought green + given custom-CA trust in Phase A1 (FlexNetOS/obscura PRs #2, #3).
